must_detect.matched_text: For an internal investigation, identifiers linked to a single employee include DOB 03/12/1987, residence near SE1 Southwark, role 'Surveillance Analyst', employer Northbridge Capital plc, device ID NB-IMAC-4472, payroll account ending 0931, staff ID UCN-48291.

Compliance memo — Northbridge Capital plc: UK MAR and FCA oversight regarding engagement with Clarion Maritime Holdings plc.
Context: Clarion Maritime is a UK issuer on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange; the 'Strategic Review Initiated' notice published via RNS on 14 January is already public.
We are coordinating employment and compliance workflows for a surveillance analyst seconded to the Clarion deal team; no inside information may cross the information barrier.
For an internal investigation, identifiers linked to a single employee include DOB 03/12/1987, residence near SE1 Southwark, role 'Surveillance Analyst', employer Northbridge Capital plc, device ID NB-IMAC-4472, payroll account ending 0931, staff ID UCN-48291.
HR case file templates list NI number and passport number fields as placeholders only; no government IDs or home addresses are recorded in this memo.
Generic contact channels are compliance@northbridgecap.co.uk (role mailbox) and the FCA public helpline 0800 000 000; do not share personal contact details.
Any issuer-side information referenced here is limited to the public RNS and FCA-published guidance; no MNPI is held by Northbridge in relation to Clarion.
Draft terms, pricing ranges, and prospective timetables for any asset sale remain hypothetical and are not being circulated internally.
Insider list updates follow UK MAR (Article 18) and the FCA Handbook; DTR 3 closed period controls are unchanged for Northbridge persons discharging managerial responsibilities.
A trade surveillance alert flagged 'possible spoofing'; the LSE order book data reviewed is anonymised and historic, and no client identifiers were present.
The alert’s 'account 42-00000' is a system bucket rather than a live client account; its inclusion should not be treated as personal data.
A junior contractor attended a vendor webcast from a device labelled NB-LAPTOP-XX, which is insufficient to identify a natural person without additional data.
Demographics such as 'based in Canary Wharf' or 'City of London office staff' are generic and should not be treated as identifying information on their own.
No wall-crossing has occurred; conversations with Clarion’s advisers are limited to public diligence points and general market practice under UK MAR.
Staff receiving market sounding enquiries must refer to the sounding policy, record the request, and decline to confirm any status as an insider.
We confirm that neither Northbridge Capital nor Clarion Maritime has provided precise, non-public information likely to significantly affect the price of Clarion securities as at the date of this memo.
